name: lv1-writer
description: Disciplined research-backed writing pipeline with genre/tone auto-detection, structure-refactoring init, per-chapter drafting, interview-driven authorship, and a feedback-response skill that verifies human reviews against the real artifact: claim-ledger research, coverage-gated inspection, per-run decision logs, and isolated research/inspect subagents so nothing ships unless every factual claim traces to a real, checked source (fiction genres swap citation for craft contracts).
